exampleSurfaces: examples/basic-usage Seraph mock previews through shared MockupPreviews rendering
fixesApplied: Made the refactor page middle register less uniform by adding a folio-note surface and loosening the lower transition so the composition reads less like a rigid product grid.

Reworked the bestiary dominant specimen into a fused manuscript canvas with gloss annotations and star ornament so the hero artifact feels embedded in the folio instead of boxed beside a separate card.
Tightened local palette and ornament emphasis around the bestiary hero and refactor mid-page surfaces using shared Seraph CSS vocabulary rather than image-based shortcuts.
residualRisks: Final fidelity is still judged by human review in this agent-only loop; there is no deterministic visual diff against the uploaded mock images.
This pass targeted the highest-impact visual misses and did not add new Storybook stories because the current remaining gap was calibration rather than missing reusable coverage.
reusableSurfacesTouched: shared manuscript annotation and ornament spacing
storybookSurfaces: Mockups/Mockup Previews via shared Seraph surfaces
Mockups/Seraph Primitives via shared CSS vocabulary
